message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Wahlstudie Berlin (West) 1954","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0588","justification":"Survey of political attitudes and voting behavior in West Berlin in the mid‑1950s, explicitly focused on electoral behavior and opinions."},{"title":"Wahlstudie Berlin (West) 1958","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0589","justification":"Follow‑up election study in West Berlin at the end of the 1950s, covering party preferences, turnout, and political attitudes."},{"title":"Wahlstudie Berlin (West) 1957 – Bundestagswahl","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0590","justification":"Election study for the 1957 federal election in West Berlin, focusing on political behavior, vote choice, and related attitudes."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen in Berlin (West), 1953","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0591","justification":"Survey of political orientations and attitudes in West Berlin in the early 1950s, including democracy, parties, and institutions."},{"title":"Politische Bewußtseinslage in Berlin (West), 1955","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0592","justification":"Study of political consciousness and opinion climate in West Berlin mid‑decade, addressing trust in politics, parties, and participation."},{"title":"Parteipräferenzen und Wahlbeteiligung in Berlin (West), 1950","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0593","justification":"Dataset on party preferences and intended electoral participation in early post‑war Berlin, directly about political behavior."},{"title":"Soziale und politische Einstellungen der Berliner Bevölkerung, 1956","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0594","justification":"Survey combining social structure variables with political attitudes among Berlin residents, suitable for analyzing behavior and opinions."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen von Jugendlichen in Berlin (West), 1957","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0595","justification":"Youth‑focused study in West Berlin on political interest, participation, and party images in the late 1950s."},{"title":"Demokratieverständnis in Berlin (West), 1954","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0596","justification":"Dataset on democratic attitudes and support for democratic institutions among Berlin residents during the 1950s."},{"title":"Öffentliche Meinung zu Parteien und Politik in Berlin (West), 1958","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0597","justification":"Opinion survey on parties, politicians, and current politics in Berlin at the end of the decade, capturing political attitudes and behavior."}]}
